programme.title: Dark Chocolate
programme.desc: This thriller murder mystery is an adaptation of the real life murder case of Sheena Bora. The discovery of a charred corpse in the woods, leads to a high-profile murder investigation.

programme.title: Pink
programme.desc: After being molested, Minal, along with her friends, tries to file an FIR against a politician's nephew. When the subsequent case gets rigged, Deepak, a retired lawyer, helps them to fight the case.

programme.title: Guzaarish
programme.desc: Renowned former magician Ethan, now a quadriplegic, files a petition for euthanasia. While he awaits the verdict, Omar, a young magic enthusiast, convinces Ethan to pass on his legacy to him.

programme.title: Mary Kom
programme.desc: When Mary Kom encounters a renowned coach in a boxing gym, she shares her boxing aspirations with him and convinces him to teach her. Despite her father's disapproval, she follows her passion.

programme.title: Sarkar
programme.desc: Subhash Nagre runs a parallel government in the city where he has a cult following. When his enemies plot to murder him, his son takes charge and stands up against them to protect him.

programme.title: Anjaana Anjaani
programme.desc: Akash and Kiara, two heartbroken and suicidal people, find each other just as they are about to end their lives. The duo then decide to live life to the fullest until New Year's Day.

programme.title: Gehraiyaan
programme.desc: Alisha finds her life disrupted by Zain, her cousin Tia's fiancé. Bound by a shared troubled past, their connection sparks both solace and turmoil.

programme.title: 2 States
programme.desc: Krish and Ananya decide that they will not get married until they can win their parents' approval, but cultural differences between the families pose a problem.

programme.title: Iqbal
programme.desc: Iqbal, a speech and hearing impaired boy, wishes to play cricket for the Indian team, but his impairment overshadows his talent. Thus, he seeks help from a former cricket player to train him.

programme.title: Mission Raniganj: The Great Bharat Rescue
programme.desc: Mission Raniganj - 2023 - Mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

programme.title: Jeena Isi Ka Naam Hai
programme.desc: Alia, an aspiring writer, marries a brutal and abusive prince to put an end to her family's misery. She runs away from him and starts a new life when he orders someone to kill their unborn girl child.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: After being sacked from his position as a bank manager, a temperamental man plots revenge by orchestrating a robbery, enlisting three unlikely accomplices.
